final:
// // This module implements a 16-bit SRAM cell with read and write capabilities. The data input is written to the memory when WE is high and RE is low, and the data is read from the memory to the data output when RE is high and WE is low.
module sram_cell (
    input wire [15:0] data_in,
    input wire WE,    // Write Enable
    input wire RE,    // Read Enable
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] memory; // 16-bit memory cell

    always @(*) begin
        if (WE && !RE) begin
            memory <= data_in; // Write operation
        end else if (RE && !WE) begin
            data_out <= memory; // Read operation
        end
    end
endmodule
